note:
Zero hot squeeze setups. Zero warm squeeze setups. You gotta be kidding me. The market’s throwing us a giant curveball, and guess what? That’s the whole point. When it goes dead quiet like this, you sit up and listen because **the absence of signals is just as loud as the presence of them**. It’s telling us nobody's making big moves right now—no urgency from either side of the trade, bulls or bears. So, what’s next? Simple: patience, positioning, and a laser focus on the few names already doing work.  

Let’s zoom out. Risk appetite feels neutral across the board. The macro backdrop is like an awkward dance—dollar steady, yields stuck in purgatory, and commodities chopping sideways. That tells me we’re in one of those holding patterns. But here’s your cheat code: this lull in action won’t last. It never does. When the squeeze signals start lighting up again (and they will), they’ll do it in clusters, and the leaders will come roaring out of the gate. The market is setting traps here. Are you going to fall into one, or are you already working the edge of the range? The bears? They’ve got nothing.  

So, no HOT or WARM setups means we drill down into what we do have—our portfolio movers. The Crypto basket continues to look strong with $ETHA back up 63% and $COIN sitting on a fat 140% gain. And $BLSH, at 186%, has completely smoked the market. That’s leadership. If you’ve got these names in the book, you're golden. Late entries? Tricky here. These are stretched, and chasing isn’t part of the plan. What about double-downs? Sorry, none today. Even our rockstars like $MP, $UUUU, and $BTU have cooled off. If anything, this is a "trail those stops and let the winners breathe" kind of environment. No need to force it.

But it’s not just crypto. The China setups are alive and kicking too: $NIO (+55%, +39%), $GDS (+51%), and even $LI (+23% now but setting up for more). And let me tell you, if these ADRs get momentum behind them, they can really fly. Keep $NIO and $GDS on your screens—they’re actionable for quick pullback entries if you’re not already in. Drones, rare earths, silver, uranium… they’re all in maintenance mode. Don't mess with the U’s ($UUUU, $UEC, $SMR) until they wake back up.  

Here’s the big question for today: who’s going to break out of the chop? With 0 squeezes in play, those holding the range lows like $BTU or $APA could be the surprise contenders. Energy is a sleeper story—$OXY and $APA are still on the radar, especially if crude oil gets any kind of bid. Eyes on that. And for the love of trades, pay attention to $CF in ags and $TEAM in software. They’re quiet, but quiet can turn loud. Full stop.

Today’s all about watching and waiting. The market’s like a coiled spring right now. Stay nimble. When momentum comes back, we’ll be ready.
